content.name: Seed of Potential
content.mantra: I am growing toward my highest self.
content.description: A seedling of infinite potential, waiting to bloom into your dreams.

content.name: Bloom of Hope
content.mantra: Each day brings new opportunities for growth.
content.description: A delicate flower representing the hope that lives within your heart.

content.name: Tree of Intention
content.mantra: My roots grow deeper as my branches reach higher.
content.description: A mighty tree grounded in purpose, stretching toward the light of possibility.

content.name: Garden of Dreams
content.mantra: I nurture my dreams with patience and love.
content.description: A mystical garden where your intentions take root and flourish.

content.name: Fern of Focus
content.mantra: I channel my energy toward what matters most.
content.description: Ancient and wise, this fern helps you maintain clarity on your path.

fixedContent.name: Celestial Potential
fixedContent.description: A beautiful plant full of potential, glowing with an inner light.

affirmations: I nurture my dreams with belief and action.
Each drop of water feeds my growing intentions.
My dedication today creates tomorrow's blooming success.
I tend to my goals with patience and love.
Every moment of care brings me closer to flourishing.
fallbacks.fixedAffirmation: I nurture my dreams with belief and action.
